anti_claim: Finance forecast evaluation spine runs statistical checks over synthetic market-shaped fixtures only. It is not investment or trading advice, uses no live market data, proves no track record or performance claim, mutates no optimizer, and treats SciPy absence as a typed HLN refusal.

research_bet_contract.positive_claim: Synthetic market-shaped fixtures exercise econometric forecast-evaluation statistics and typed refusals without making market, advice, performance, or track-record claims.
required_witnesses: stationary bootstrap and Bartlett HAC variance rows
typed refusal rows for inadmissible cases
source-manifest lineage distinguishing the current 13-module exported bundle from the older 9-import validation envelope

private_inputs_forbidden: private repo bodies outside copied public fixtures
operator private notes or raw thread bodies
public_private_boundary.public_inputs: public synthetic fixtures, copied non-secret macro source bodies, hashes, anchors, validator refs, and generated receipts

receipt_contract.coverage_vocabulary_rule: Public copy may describe the current exported source manifest as 13 copied non-secret finance modules. A first-wave exported-bundle receipt with copied_macro_source_count=9 is lineage for the older coverage envelope, not the current manifest count.

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Finance forecast evaluation spine runs statistical checks over synthetic market-shaped fixtures only. It is not investment or trading advice, uses no live market data, proves no track record or performance claim, mutates no optimizer, and treats SciPy absence as a typed HLN refusal.
standard_payload.ontology: A public Microcosm organ for finance forecast evaluation spine.
standard_payload.teleology: Runs public synthetic econometric forecast-evaluation fixtures through copied finance statistics modules and records p-value/refusal behavior without live market data or advice claims.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: Positive fixture inputs must produce pass receipts with real_substrate_disposition=real_substrate_capsule.
Expected negative cases must emit their stable error codes without blocking positive execution.
source_module_manifest.json must match copied bodies by digest, line count, and required anchors.
Receipts must carry refs, hashes, counts, verdicts, and anti-claims without embedding copied macro body text.
The authority ceiling must reject the organ-specific overclaim classes declared in this standard.

author.purpose: create a valid Finance forecast evaluation spine instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Finance forecast evaluation spine without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_finance_forecast_evaluation_spine and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, product-readiness, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry-backed source standard already carried accepted, active, source-body-import, or body-floor status; this update narrows it into the active v2 JSON contract shape without raising its authority ceiling.
